title: Bounty Vouchers Earned
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TotalReward), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS kills FROM Bounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {kills} wanted target(s) destroyed and bounty vouchers submitted to station security, earning {total} Cr during the report period. Bounty payouts stack across all issuing factions for each kill — a ship wanted across multiple jurisdictions pays out from each faction simultaneously.
details.help: Bounty.TotalReward sums all rewards across all factions for each kill. total drives the title.

tagLines: Bounty voucher submission totals updated. The relevant security services acknowledge your contribution.
Wanted ships reduced to debris. The insurance companies are not happy. You are.
Every credit here had a body — specifically, the body of a ship that had it coming.
